summary: One authGate ordering violation remains in the gateway route wiring.

findings.invariant: 4. The new authGate middleware authenticates from HEADERS before the 50MB largeJson body parser runs, so an unauthenticated request is refused with zero body buffering (no pre-auth memory DoS); the handler reuses the stashed principal (no double verify, no TOCTOU).
findings.title: /classify buffers the 50MB body before authentication
findings.recommendation: Wire /classify through authGate before largeJson and reuse res.locals.gatewayPrincipal in the handler, matching the messages/count_tokens routes.
